articles.title: South Korea Stock Boom: Why Kospi Is World’s Most Volatile Benchmark Stock Index
articles.summary: Investing in South Korea’s stock market has yielded huge returns this year, but it’s been a wild ride. Volatility on the benchmark Kospi Index has topped 60%, almost double that of Japan’s Nikkei 225.

articles.title: Key China Copper Gauge Rallies to $100 After Tax Crackdown
articles.summary: A closely-watched gauge of China’s copper market has risen to the highest in more than a year, as a tax shake-up in the metal’s biggest market spurs a shortage of scrap and boosts demand for imports.
